name: The Best Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Wait 10 minutes before starting to make the cake. Meanwhile, spray and flour two 8-inch layer pans.
2. In a large bowl, thoroughly combine the flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt.
3. Add the warm water, vegetable oil, vanilla extract, and white distilled vinegar to the dry ingredients. Stir until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pans.
5. Bake for 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool on wire racks for 10 minutes. Then transfer the cakes to a cooling rack and allow them to cool completely.
7. Frost with your favorite chocolate frosting (using vegan margarine and a small amount of soy milk instead of butter and milk).
Good luck! My daughter is also vegan and will be home soon for spring break. I think I'll bake this treat for her. Thanks for the reminder!
